news_items.headline: Misiorowski sets SP record with 103.7 mph pitch
news_items.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski fired a 103.7 mph pitch during Saturday's game against the Rockies, the fastest by a starter since tracking began in 2008.

news_items.headline: Mets halt Polanco rehab for more testing on ankle
news_items.summary: Mets veteran infielder Jorge Polanco, who has appeared in just two games after signing a two-year, $40M contract, will undergo further testing on his ankle.

news_items.headline: Yankees catcher Wells joins Stanton, Judge on IL
news_items.summary: Yankees catcher Austin Wells, suffering from cervical headaches while in the midst of a seasonlong slump, joined Aaron Judge and Giancarlo Stanton on the injured list.

news_items.headline: Dodgers move Glasnow to 60-day IL with back injury...
news_items.summary: Dodgers starter Tyler Glasnow, who has been out since May 8 with a back injury, still hasn't been cleared to resume a throwing program and was moved to the 60-day injured list Saturday.

news_items.headline: Brewers acquire Kuhnel from A's as injuries mount
news_items.summary: Right-hander Joel Kuhnel was acquired by the Brewers from the Athletics for cash after Brian Fitzpatrick became their eighth pitcher on the injured list.

news_items.headline: Reds hope ace Greene back before All-Star break
news_items.summary: The Reds have moved up their timetable for right-hander Hunter Greene's return, with the team hopeful their ace can be back before the All-Star break in July.

news_items.headline: First-place Rays moving struggling Matz to bullpen...
news_items.summary: The Rays are moving left-hander Steven Matz from the rotation to the bullpen after two poor starts in which his ERA has climbed to 5.48 this season.
